channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped mattresses, 28th March
item.description:
2 mattresses dumped last week not belonging to the Close residents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11/11A, Blythe Close, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Marmont Road, 28th March
item.description:
Dodgy wobbly sign, other side similar. Been like this for months. Wobbles in the wind.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Staffordshire Street, Peckham, Greater London
